title: Registered in Ontario - Canada.ca
content:
## Registered in Ontario
The My Ontario Account offers fast and easy ways to notify the Ministry of Public and Business Service Delivery and Procurement , the Ontario Ministry of Finance , the Workplace Safety and Insurance Board , and the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) that you are updating your business information, closing your account, or cancelling your business name registration.
For more information, go to Ontario Business Registry .
With the CRA , for the goods and services tax / harmonized sales tax (GST/HST) , payroll deductions, and corporate income tax programs, you can:
- change the principal place of business address
- change the business mailing address
- change your program account contact information
- close your GST/HST , payroll deductions, or corporate income tax accounts
- Service Ontario – Business services
- Sign in to your CRA account

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
